title: Selling Presets Without Stripe: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian digital creator selling presets online, but Stripe says you're outside their allowed regions. You're not alone. Many creators in countries like Ghana, Pakistan, or Bangladesh face similar issues with PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip. They can't collect payments or access their earnings due to strict KYC requirements, geographic restrictions, or banking limitations. It's time to break free from these constraints and find a reliable, secure, and efficient way to sell digital products, like presets, globally.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for digital creators, but they come with significant limitations. PayPal, for example, blocks accounts from 'high-risk' countries like Nigeria, while Stripe has a strict KYC policy that excludes many users. Gumroad and Payhip have similar restrictions, making it difficult for creators in restricted countries to sell their digital products. In contrast, Unchained Commerce offers a range of infrastructure tools, like the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), that allow creators to sell presets directly to buyers without relying on these platforms. With Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can generate multi-chain QR codes, live price feeds, and accept payments in over 300 coins, including BTC, ETH, and USDT. This means creators can sell presets without worrying about Stripe, PayPal, or other platform restrictions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The biggest problem with PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip is their strict KYC policies and geographic restrictions. Creators in restricted countries are often unable to verify their identities or access their earnings due to these restrictions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure tools, like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), are designed to be accessible to creators in any country. The Core Shop Engine is a backend solution that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, eliminating the need for creators to rely on Stripe or PayPal. This means creators can sell presets without worrying about KYC requirements or geographic restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure tools are a game-changer. With the Admin Dashboard ($29.99), creators can track transactions, manage orders, and access real-time analytics, making it easy to stay on top of sales and earnings. The Admin Dashboard also integrates seamlessly with the Core Shop Engine, allowing creators to automate delivery and payment verification. This means creators can focus on what matters most – creating and selling presets – without worrying about the nitty-gritty details of payment processing. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe often charge high fees and have slow payment processing times, making it difficult for creators to get paid in a timely manner.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Unchained Commerce's infrastructure tools are designed to automate as much of the sales process as possible, making it easy for creators to focus on what matters most – creating and selling presets. With the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99), creators get access to everything they need to sell presets online, including the Core Shop Engine, Admin Dashboard, and Web3 Wallet Connect. This means creators can automate delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to get paid and stay organized. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe require creators to manually process payments and handle customer support, making it a time-consuming and labor-intensive process.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Unchained Commerce's infrastructure tools and PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip depends on your specific situation. If you're a creator in a restricted country or struggling with KYC requirements, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. With its automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, creators can focus on what matters most – creating and selling presets – without worrying about the nitty-gritty details of payment processing. Whether you're selling presets, ebooks, or courses, Unchained Commerce has the tools and solutions you need to succeed in the digital marketplace.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a creator in a restricted country or struggling with PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, Unchained Commerce has the solutions you need to sell presets online. Check out our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more about our infrastructure tools and how they can help you succeed in the digital marketplace. With Unchained Commerce, you can sell presets without worrying about KYC requirements, geographic restrictions, or slow payment processing times.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling presets with Unchained Commerce, follow these steps: Sign up for an account on our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html; Choose the infrastructure tools that best fit your needs, such as the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) or Full Stack Bundle ($79.99); Set up your payment processor, which will be integrated with the Core Shop Engine; Create your digital product, such as a preset, and upload it to your Unchained Commerce account; Promote your product to your audience and start selling!
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
